'''''Titania''''' was a [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] which served under [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] in the [[Battle of Kathol System]].
During the battle, the Titania suffered massive damage in an all-out assault by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] commander, [[Kursk Mal'ia]]. Despite this damage, however, the guns aboard the Titania continued to fire, even as other ship systems failed.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Endgame (adventure)|book=Endgame|reprint=yes}}
